mapper.sql: id, after_sales_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, after_sales_type, status, reason_code, reason_text, apply_amount, approved_amount, applicant_remark, reviewer_id, review_remark, reviewed_at, completed_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM after_sales_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sales_order ( after_sales_no, order_id, order_no, user_id, after_sales_type, status, reason_code, reason_text, apply_amount, approved_amount, applicant_remark, version, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{afterSalesNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{afterSalesType}, #{status}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonText}, #{applyAmount}, #{approvedAmount}, #{applicantRemark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sales_order SET reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, approved_amount = #{approvedAmount}, status = #{newStatus}, reviewed_at = NOW(), version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
